basic_details.job_title: NFSU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU) has published the Research Assistant and Field Investigator Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions. Candidates up to 32 years of age with an M.A./ M.Sc. in Clinical Psychology, Forensic Psychology, or Criminology with at least 55% marks, along with NET /M.Phil./ Ph.D. qualification and the prescribed language proficiency, are eligible to attend the walk-in interview through the official website https://www.nfsu.ac.in. The walk-in interview will be held on 02 July 2026, and candidat

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: M.A/ M.Sc. in Clinical/Forensic Psychology/Criminology with minimum 55% marks and NET/ MPhil/ PhD, Proficiency in Gujarati and English, Proficiency in Hindi and English, Proficiency in Tamil and English
qualification.details: Research Assistant for NFSU Gandhinagar Campus: M.A/M.Sc. in Clinical/ Forensic Psychology/ Criminology with a minimum 55% aggregated or equivalent grade with NET/MPhil/PhD, along with Proficiency in speaking, reading and writing in Gujarati and English. Desirable Qualification: Two years' research Experience. Field Investigator for NFSU Delhi Campus: M.A/M.Sc. in Clinical/ Forensic Psychology/ Criminology with a minimum 55% aggregated or equivalent grade, along with Proficiency in speaking, reading and writing in Hindi and English. Desirable Qualification: Research Experience. Field Investigator for NFSU Chennai Campus: M.A/M.Sc. in Clinical /Forensic Psychology/ Criminology with a minimum 55% aggregated or equivalent grade, along with Proficiency in speaking, reading and writing in Tamil and English. Desirable Qualification: Research Experience.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Research Assistant for NFSU Gandhinagar Campus
Field Investigator for NFSU Delhi Campus
Field Investigator for NFSU Chennai Campus

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Research Assistant for NFSU Gandhinagar Campus
Field Investigator for NFSU Delhi Campus
Field Investigator for NFSU Chennai Campus

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NFSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the NFSU Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 02 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time on the specified date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by NFSU?
faq.answer: NFSU has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Research Assistant and Field Investigator through this walk-in drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.A/M.Sc. in Clinical/Forensic Psychology/Criminology with a minimum of 55% marks and NET/MPhil/PhD. Specific language proficiencies are also required for different posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 32 years. There is no mention of minimum age limit or age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NFSU recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the walk-in interview with all required documents on the specified date and venue.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Which campuses are covered under this NFSU recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment covers NFSU Gandhinagar Campus (for Research Assistant), NFSU Delhi Campus, and NFSU Chennai Campus (for Field Investigators).

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the NFSU Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.
